name: Mediterranean Market Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 package (6.6 oz.) sun-dried tomato cous cous
2 cans (5 oz.) chunk breast of chicken or ham, drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare couscous according to package directions.
2. Chill the prepared couscous.
3. Toss the cooled couscous with remaining ingredients (chicken or ham, mozzarella cheese, black olives, and Italian salad dressing).
4. Serve alone or in hollowed tomatoes. Serves 4-6.
